title: Dalton Steps Forward
description: On pages 13–16, dalton steps forward as the Straw Hats reach Drum Island, but the armed villagers fear pirates and refuse to welcome them until Vivi pleads for Nami’s life.
scene: Dalton Steps Forward. The Straw Hats reach Drum Island, but the armed villagers fear pirates and refuse to welcome them until Vivi pleads for Nami’s life. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: No, wait! This isn't a problem you can solve by fighting!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You don't have to worry about me, the bullet only grazed my arm!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We promise not to set foot on your country...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: So could you please just call over a doctor!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Our friend is gravely ill and in much pain! Please help her!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: you're failing to carry out your duties as ship captain, Luffy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: recklessly fighting isn't always going to solve everything...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: If you were to start a fight right now,

summary: This part centers on dalton steps forward, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
